title: Dashboard hangs when multiple tabs are open (SSE connection exhaustion)

steps.description: Frontend: add dashboard/static/sse-shared-worker.js (SharedWorker multiplexing a single EventSource('/api/stream/events') to all connected ports) and dashboard/static/sse-client.js (window.iwSSE API with SharedWorker-first, EventSource fallback). Include sse-client.js globally in dashboard/templates/base.html. Migrate queue.html, batches.html, batch_detail.html, item_detail.html, tests.html, quality.html, and system/running.html from per-page `new EventSource('/api/stream/events')` to iwSSE.on(...).

Code review: S01 (single upstream connection; port lifecycle; event-type parity with the client-facing SSE names emitted by _event_generator in sse.py — running-update/status-update/test-update/quality-update/toast — NOT _WATCHED_EVENTS; handler signature compatible with existing page code; fallback triggers on missing SharedWorker; all 7 pages migrated; job-specific EventSource usages untouched).

Tests: reproduction test tests/dashboard/browser/test_sse_shared_worker.py asserting server-side connection count ≤ 2 when 6 Playwright contexts are open; template wiring test tests/dashboard/test_sse_client_wiring.py asserting base.html includes sse-client.js and every migrated page contains zero `new EventSource('/api/stream/events')`. Both tests must fail against pre-fix code and pass against fixed code.

Code review: S03 (assertion bound is specific numeric ≤ 2 not shape; tests would FAIL against pre-fix code; every AC is mapped to a test; no live DB in tests; tests clean up playwright sessions; fanout of all 5 event types is exercised).

Final cross-layer review: AC1-AC7 complete; grep dashboard/templates/ shows zero `new EventSource('/api/stream/events')`; event-type names in sse-shared-worker.js match the client-facing SSE names emitted by _event_generator in sse.py (running-update/status-update/test-update/quality-update/toast — NOT _WATCHED_EVENTS, which is a server-side DaemonEvent.event_type filter); sse-client.js loaded before any {% block scripts %}; server-side sse.py unchanged; out-of-scope job-specific EventSource usages (oss/docs/code) preserved.

QV: Browser verification — open 6 tabs in distinct Playwright contexts; assert server-side /api/stream/events connection count stays ≤ 3 (instead of 6+); assert navigation under multi-tab load is responsive; assert a DaemonEvent fans out to all tabs via the shared worker; verify out-of-scope job-stream pages still work; assert connection count drops when tabs close.
